formulas.name: LastSentence
formulas.expression:
IF({!varType}=="SUN - Final", "Any future changes to be managed by field operations via client management functions.
Thank you", "Thank you")

formulas.name: SubjectFirstLetter
formulas.expression: IF({!varType}=="SUN - Final", "FINAL ", IF({!varType}=="SUN - Preliminary", "Preliminary ", IF({!varType}=="SUN - Revision", "REVISION to ", null )))

Flow.label: SubFlow: SUN Orchestration Email Alert : AutoLaunchFlow

textTemplates.name: Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Hello All,
Please see the {!SubjectFirstLetter} startup notification for the following site: {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Name}

{!SubjectFirstLetter} Startup Notification Report
 
Account / Hospital Name {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Name}
Service Line {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Service_Line__r.Name}
Global Facility ID {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Global_Facility_ID__c}
Parent Account / Hospital {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.Name}
Services Sold {!Get_PMT_Phase.Services_Sold__c}
Physical Address {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStreet}
City {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingCity}
State {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStateCode}
Zip {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingPostalCode}
Phone {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Phone}
Client Owner {!ClientOwnerName}
Client Owner Type {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Owner_Type__c}
Facility Short Name {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Facility_Short_Name__c}
Annual ED Billable Volume {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.ED_Volume__c}
Annual HM Patient Encounters {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.HM_Volume__c}
Tele Services Active {!TeleServicesActive}
Leased Employees {!Get_PMT_Phase.Leased_Employees__c}
If Leased Employees Ins Provided By {!Get_PMT_Phase.If_Leased_Employees_Ins_Provided_By__c}
Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.Insurance_Limits_per_Occurrence__c}
Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.Insurance_Limits_Aggregate__c}
Insurance Provided By {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Insurance_Provided_By__c}
Corporate Entity {!ServicesContractingEntityName}
Client Start Up Date {!Get_PMT_Phase.Client_Start_Up_Date__c}
Client Start Up Time {!PMTClientStartUpTime}
Client Start Up Time Zone {!Get_PMT_Phase.Client_Start_Up_Time_Zone__c}
Billing Company {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Billing_Company__c}
Staffing Team {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Staffing_Team__c}
Client Division {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Division__c}
Client Region {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Region__c}
Position being Recruited {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Position_being_Recruited__c}

{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

{!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

Confidential Information – Do Not Distribute

{!LastSentence}

textTemplates.name: Email_Body_Final
textTemplates.text:
Hello All,
Please see the {!SubjectFirstLetter} startup notification for the following site: {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Name}

{!SubjectFirstLetter} Startup Notification Report
 
Account / Hospital Name {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Name}
Service Line {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Service_Line__r.Name}
Global Facility ID {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Global_Facility_ID__c}
Parent Account / Hospital {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.Name}
Services Sold {!Get_PNC_Q1.Services_Sold__c}
Physical Address {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStreet}
City {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingCity}
State {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStateCode}
Zip {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingPostalCode}
Phone {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Phone}
Client Owner {!ClientOwnerName}
Client Owner Type {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Owner_Type__c}
Facility Short Name {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Facility_Short_Name__c}
Annual ED Billable Volume {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.ED_Volume__c}
Annual HM Patient Encounters {!Get_Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail.HM_Volume__c}
Tele Services Active {!TeleServicesActive}
Leased Employees {!Get_PNC_Q1.Leased_Employee__c}
If Leased Employees Ins Provided By {!Get_PNC_Q1.If_Leased_Employees_Ins_Provided_By__c}
Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence {!Get_PNC_Q2.Contract__r.Occurrence_Limit__c}
Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate {!Get_PNC_Q2.Contract__r.Annual_Aggregate__c}
Insurance Provided By {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Insurance_Provided_By__c}
Corporate Entity {!ServicesContractingEntityName}
Client Start Up Date {!Get_PNC_Q1.Client_Start_Up_Date__c}
Client Start Up Time {!Q1ClientStartUpTime}
Client Start Up Time Zone {!Get_PNC_Q1.Client_Start_Up_Time_Zone__c}
Billing Company {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Billing_Company__c}
Staffing Team {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Staffing_Team__c}
Client Division {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Division__c}
Client Region {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Client_Region__c}
Position being Recruited {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Position_being_Recruited__c}

{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

{!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

Confidential Information – Do Not Distribute

{!LastSentence}

textTemplates.name: SUNFinalEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hello All,


Please see the {!SubjectFirstLetter} startup notification for the following site:

{!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__r.Name} {!Get_PMT_Phase.Service_Account__c}


<Display - see Fields to be visible in the Email. In the table there are a few fields that are prefixed with “FINAL”, use those labels and field mapping to populate the value. >


Any future changes to be managed by field operations via client management functions.


Thank you
